texto: And what, O Queen, are those things that are dear to a man? Are they not bubbles? texto: It is far. But there is no journey upon this earth that a man may not make if he sets his heart to it. texto: Man doeth this and doeth that from the good or evil of his heart; but he knows not to what end his sense doth prompt him; for when he strikes he is blind to where the blow shall fall, nor can he count the airy threads that weave the web of circumstance. But Good persisted, and once only did the Kukuana people get the chance of seeing his beautiful legs again. Good is a very modest man. Henceforward they had to satisfy their aesthetic longings with his one whisker, his transparent eye, and his movable teeth.

texto: Women love the last blow as well as the last word, and when they fight for love they are pitiless as a wounded buffalo.
explicacao: Citação de H. Rider Haggard sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Women love the last blow as well as the last word, and when they fight for love they are pitiless…” articula amor, love, women em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como women.

texto: So they crucified their Messiah? Well can I believe it. That He was a Son of the Living Spirit would be naught to them, if indeed He was so.... They would care little for any God if he came not with pomp and power.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de H. Rider Haggard que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “So they crucified their Messiah? Well can I believe it. That He was a Son of the Living Spirit wo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, crucified, crucifixion, com foco em crucifixion e god.

texto: ...For like a rugged tree you are hard and sound at the core.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a H. Rider Haggard: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “...For like a rugged tree you are hard and sound at the core.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, compliment, compliments pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de compliments e reliability.
